visa_types.documents_required:
Document Checklist – Click here
For more information :  https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > kgz > en > Table:National Visa – Family reunification > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 35 Euros (Inclusive at VAT 16 % ) payable in cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Kyrgyz soms is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for Family unification purposes please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/visa-and-services/national-visa/employment).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa for Family unification purposes please click here (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/dilli-en/visa-and-services/national-visa/employment).

## Visa Fees

[svk > kgz > en > Table:National Visa – Family reunification > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 35 Euros (Inclusive at VAT 16 % ) payable in cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Kyrgyz soms is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
For more information :  https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/astana-en/visa-and-services/national-visa)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4xRZ9q3HkSg3bbpfDLXCpw/180f10800edbb70fa20956f5431687f3/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application Form
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > kgz > en > Table:Study, Research or other types of Internship > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 35 Euros ( Inclusive at VAT 16 % ) payable in cash / QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kyrgyz soms is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4xRZ9q3HkSg3bbpfDLXCpw/180f10800edbb70fa20956f5431687f3/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 15 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted. 

## Download Forms
Application for Visa
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it takes 30 working days to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Overview

## Visa Fees

[svk > kgz > en > Table:National Visa – Study ( Only for special Degree in Slovakia ) > Visa Fees 1]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in Cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 35 Euros (Inclusive at VAT 16 % ) payable in cash/ QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Kyrgyz soms is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

Document Checklist – Click here

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4xRZ9q3HkSg3bbpfDLXCpw/180f10800edbb70fa20956f5431687f3/PhotoSpecifications.pdf)), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

[svk > kgz > en > Table:Cultural, Sports or Religious events and for film crews > Visa Fees 1]

Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 35 Euros ( Inclusive at VAT 16 % ) payable in cash / QR or by Debit/Credit Card.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in Kyrgyz soms is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
Document Checklist – Click here
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
